name: Sanjivani Rasayan | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications: This is indicated in Physical & mental weakness, Senile debility, Nervous exhaustion & Stress.
composition:
Each 5 ml contains extracts of-

Withania somnifera 0.21 gm
Mucuna prurita 0.21 gm
Asparagus racemosus 0.21 gm
Sida cordifolia 0.21 gm
Vitis vinifera 0.62 gm
Myristica fragrans 0.10 gm
Cinnamomum zeylanicum 20.62 mg
Elettarea cardamomum 20.62 mg
Mesua ferrea 20.62 mg
Crocus sativus 20.62 mg
pharmacology: Sanjivani Rasayan is a combination of some effective herbs that have antioxidant, immune enhancing, rejuvenating, anxiolytic, antidepressant and nutritive properties. It is used to combat physical weakness, mental weakness, nervous exhaustion etc. It is very effective in senile debility and stress. It is used for all ages of both male & female patients.
dosage__administration: Adults: 2-4 teaspoonful 2-3 times daily after meal. Children: 1-2 teaspoonful 2-3 times daily after meal or as directed by the registered physician.
side_effects: There is no significant side effect.
pregnancy__lactation: Not recommended for use during pregnancy. (due to presence of Withania somnifera, Cinnamomum zeylanicum & Crocus sativus). There is no sufficient information for use in lactation.
